title: consolida stocksiana var. kabuliana
intro: Consolida stocksiana var. kabuliana, also known as Kabul poppy or red field poppy, is a plant species belonging to the Papaveraceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Afghanistan. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving pain, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Consolida stocksiana var. kabuliana can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat respiratory problems, menstrual cramps, and skin conditions.
